name: Giant Freshwater Stingray
conservationEfforts: Research expeditions in Thailand, Cambodia, and Borneo. Community-based fisheries management. The largest specimen ever recorded (300 kg) was caught and released in Cambodia in 2022.
description: One of the world's largest freshwater fish, with a disc width of up to 2.4 meters. They bury themselves in sandy river bottoms and have a venomous tail barb up to 38 cm long.
